channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Brewers, Murphy Agree To New Three-Year Deal
item.description: Notable news, notes and buzz with MLB spring training ramping up ahead of the World Baseball Classic and Opening Day.

item.title: Kansas Star Darryn Peterson Is 'Getting Terrible Advice' Amid Cramping Saga
item.description: The saga surrounding Kansas star Darryn Peterson, arguably the nation's best men's college basketball player, continues.

item.title: World Cup Watch: MLS Will Be Where USA's Goalkeeper Battle Will Play Out
item.description: The two top candidates to be the man in the net for the USA at the World Cup will duke it out in MLS.

item.title: Francisco Lindor Responds To Steve Cohen's Comments On Mets Captaincy: 'I Respect It'
item.description: Francisco Lindor says he respects the declaration this week by New York Mets owner Steve Cohen that there will never be a captain as long as he owns t...

item.title: Bears' Caleb Williams Might Be NFL's Best QB In 2026, Says Colin Cowherd
item.description: Caleb Williams proved he could quarterback in 2025, but Colin Cowherd thinks he can take a step forward in 2026.

item.title: Golden goal: Keller, U.S. women top Canada in OT
item.description: Megan Keller scored the golden goal in 3-on-3 overtime as the United States women's hockey team won Olympic gold by beating archrival Canada 2-1.

item.title: Indiana passes bill to lure Bears from Chicago
item.description: The Bears' search for a new home took a "meaningful step" forward Thursday, opening the door for the storied franchise to leave Illinois to potentiall...

item.title: C's Brown not appeased by Beverly Hills' apology
item.description: The city of Beverly Hills apologized to Celtics star Jaylen Brown on Thursday over inaccuracies in a previous statement, but Brown continued to take i...

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG inform Man City of Haaland interest
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have asked Manchester City to let them know if Erling Haaland ever becomes available. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Liu captures elusive figure skating gold for U.S.
item.description: Alysa Liu won the first women's figure skating gold medal for the United States in 24 years at the Winter Olympics in Milan on Thursday.
